meta.title: Influence of Bifidobacterium longum BB536 intake on faecal microbiota in individuals with Japanese cedar pollinosis during the pollen season

abstractHtml: Abbreviations: JCP, Japanese cedar pollen; JCPsis, Japanese cedar pollinosis; PAD-HCM, phylogenetic assignment database for T-RFLP analysis of human colonic microbiota; PC, principal component; PCA, principal component analysis; T-RFLP, terminal-RFLP; T-RF, terminal restriction fragment.
